evidence_paragraphs.snippet: The Castle is in an uproar with preparations for [Tywin Lannister](wiki:Tywin_Lannister)’s host’s departure. Ser [Addam Marbrand](wiki:Addam_Marbrand) was the first to depart, a day before the rest....

Arya has been kept busy running messages from dawn to dust. She has even delivered messages beyond the wall, and considered running away except that Weese told her he would deliver her to [Vargo...
